title: December 25
content:
<noinclude>{{Top|real|nocat=1}}
{{Month|December}}

'''December 25''' is the 359th day (360th in leap years) of the year. There are 6 days remaining.</noinclude>

[[In-universe]], this day is represented by [[Life Day]], a [[Wookiee]] celebration of joy and harmony.

*[[1975]] – [[Daxiong]] is born.
*[[1977]] – ''[[Star Wars]]'' released as ''La Guerra de las Galaxias'' in [[Wikipedia:Mexico|Mexico]].
*[[1979]] – [[Star Wars (1977) 33|''Star Wars'' (1977) 33]] published.
*[[1987]] – [[Joe Kaye]] dies.
*[[2002]] – ''[[The Official Star Wars Fact File 52]]'' published.
*[[2015]] – [[Jason Wingreen]] dies.
*[[2020]] – ''[[Disney Gallery: The Mandalorian: Making of Season Two]]'' premieres on [[Disney+]].
*2020 – [[Han Solo (booklet)|''Han Solo'']] published in France.
*[[2023]] – [[Richard Franklin]] dies.
*[[2024]] – [[Battle of Jakku — Last Stand 1|''Battle of Jakku — Last Stand'' 1]] published.
<noinclude>
